user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Peter Hughes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJAR3xi0vAOz_87izCYC7TPLB1gnB7pYQplCeOYSf4HLXLuXA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Estuvimos en el Marbella Club Hotel para el cumpleaños de mi esposa y todo fue perfecto.
Nos sentimos bienvenidos y cómodos desde el primer momento. El servicio fue acogedor, atento y discreto. La habitación era muy confortable y estaba muy bien equipada.
El desayuno fue fabuloso. El jardín transmite una calma relajada y casi zen. Lo mismo podemos decir de los restaurantes.
En resumen, una experiencia perfecta.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carmen Rodríguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSV-BFQ-3tBO94GoYOqed1JqE1GCQLZRIzcUyBtJ_6yPPiSsM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nos quedamos extremadamente satisfechos con nuestra estancia en este hotel en Marbella. Desde el primer momento en que hicimos el check-in, fuimos recibidos por un equipo amable y profesional. Las habitaciones estaban impecables, eran amplias y muy cómodas. Nos impresionaron especialmente la comodidad de las camas y la decoración de la habitación.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Francisco Collado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9_TRW-dyY6i1D3S286qBZplGYw5ipHwgVrEOxtRUjtuUNM4Aw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El Marbella Club es, sin duda, uno de esos lugares donde la excelencia se siente en cada detalle. Desde el primer momento, el servicio es impecable, cercano y auténtico, reflejo del gran liderazgo de Julián Cabanillas, su director, y de la visión y sensibilidad de Rebeca Martín, al frente del equipo comercial y de marketing.

Cada estancia se convierte en una experiencia única, con un equilibrio perfecto entre elegancia, calidez y profesionalidad.
Quisiera destacar especialmente la atención de Alberto, del departamento de F&B: su amabilidad, conocimiento y dedicación hacen que cada comida o cena sea memorable.

En definitiva, el Marbella Club no solo ofrece lujo, ofrece hospitalidad con alma. Un lugar donde siempre quieres volver.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Miguel Ángel Jiménez Justo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKmwSw9SLdQvqALvQZdgYtQhW80Eyj2KWWTTA08036WeZOoOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cuando pagas calidad, esperas recibirla y la verdad que este hotel está a la altura de los mejores. Desde las habitaciones que son de gran confort, hasta la comida, pasando por el servicio. La comida en el Chiringuito de Marbella Club, me pareció espectacular, soy amante de las paellas y está en el top 2 de las mejores que probé en toda mi vida. Por otro lado todo el personal del hotel, desde camareros, pasando por conserjería hasta empleadas que hacen las habitaciones son muy profesionales y cercanos. Me gustaría destacar el servicio impecable por parte de Cala de conserjería que me ayudó en sobremanera a facilitarme un trámite de un incidente que tuve con una empresa de alquileres de coche, también Laura del spa tuvo un servicio de gran calidad y Yolanda que hacía las habitaciones un día que estuve muy ocupado con reuniones y ocio le dejé la habitación como una auténtica leonera y no solo hizo la labor de la habitación que le corresponde sino que me dobló la ropa y me organizó todo el desorden de mis cosas. Pero, la verdad que el servicio por parte de todos fue impecable. Un 10 de hotel. Lo he recomendado a familiares y amigos. Y a título personal, volveré seguro.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Manu Morille","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLdCBFY4A2AqHOhYS_zdDTQw3YrOJWvmiYQ_m1BI1sJrsAlU8Ey=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Penoso servicio, si es que se puede llamar servicio a algo así.
Fuimos a tomar una cerveza y disfrutar de la actuación. Al poco tiempo de estar tomándola, ya observamos que nos miraban continuamente, fue muy incómodo. Pero para nuestro asombro, al rato vinieron y, sin haberlo pedido, nos trajeron la cuenta. Al preguntarles por qué nos traían la cuenta nos dijeron que "nos teníamos que ir, que necesitaban la mesa". Les dijimos que estábamos consumiendo, pero dijeron que "muy despacio". Que teníamos que consumir más. Esto atenta gravemente contra las más básicas normas cívicas, de respeto y de convivencia, además de ser ilegal. No pueden cobrarnos por entrar por un tiempo limitado sin habernos avisado antes de que teníamos que poner el cronómetro cuando empezásemos a beber. Esto no solo arruinó nuestra velada, sino que sería hasta demandable por atentar directamente contra nuestro honor y reputación, ya que el numerito que montaron en nuestra mesa delante del resto de clientes no venía a cuento y no teníamos por qué soportar semejante escarnio público solo por beber nuestra cerveza al ritmo que nos gusta beberla. Creo que cuando pagas 14 euros por una cerveza (aunque esto aplica igual, o debería, cuando la cerveza vale 2 euros) nadie puede echarte, y si esa es la política de admisión del local, se requiere que sea pública y notoria y se haya anunciado en un lugar visible a la entrada. Hay leyes para eso, no me lo invento. Fue una aunténtica grosería y falta de respeto. Somos clientes habituales, pero ya no volveremos, y honestamente, creo que nadie debería ir a este lugar que psiotea a las personas en busca de ganar unos euros más. Calidad humana nefasta, inexistente. No recomiendo a nadie pisar este lugar.

Pathetic service, if you can even call this a service.
We went for a beer and to enjoy the show. Shortly after sitting down with our drinks, we noticed that we were being watched constantly, which was very uncomfortable. But to our astonishment, after a while, they came over and, without us asking, brought us the bill. When we asked why, they said, “You have to leave, we need the table.”
We told them we were still consuming, but they replied, “Too slowly.” That we had to order more.
This seriously violates the most basic civic norms of respect and coexistence, not to mention that it is illegal. They cannot charge us for limited time at a table without warning us in advance that we had to set a timer as soon as we started drinking.
This not only ruined our evening, but could even be grounds for a lawsuit, as it directly attacked our honor and reputation, given that the scene they made at our table in front of the other customers was totally unnecessary. We shouldn’t have to endure such public humiliation just for drinking our beer at our own pace.
I believe that when you pay 14 euros for a beer (though this should also apply when the beer costs 2 euros), nobody has the right to kick you out. If that’s the establishment’s policy, it must be public and clearly announced at the entrance. There are laws for this; I’m not making it up.
It was an utter act of rudeness and disrespect. We are regular customers, but we will not return, and honestly, I don’t think anyone should go to a place that tramples on people just to make a few more euros. Appalling, non-existent human quality. I do not recommend this place to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"431mariabelenm","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeWB0GIG9gGd6g9zDFXwjE9TRuKRtAO6HvwA5jEdK_CrOJXcVxp8esjQRYTFMjay2JK=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Excelente hotel para disfrutar unos días de playa, el agua de mar es más bien fría, el servicio del hotel es excelente volvería sin dudarlo","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Guide54168604651","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QdHDxxyBDO6igPA51sqxYAI1TTeuGvapT1sWSCJfPSgzOZltNlMhWmUDpj2A3v7zAw89g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"He estado 4 noches en Marbella Club, fue una experiencia inolvidable. Desde el momento de la reserva, cuando llegué la bienvenida inigualable, y todo el personal hizo todo lo posible para garantizar mi comodidad y satisfacción. Es un lujoso alojamiento, pero con un servicio excepcional muy cercano y amigable. Hicieron que mi estancia fuera realmente memorable. La ubicación privilegiada junto al mar, y el clima tan bueno, hacen que estoy deseando volver a Marbella Club en mi próxima visita. Muy recomendable!! Blanca","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Borja Miranda Jimenez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocInwIZZv0KmHPP7eIQ98eswRs10ve3Tc9AWbgg9cQFtMzc5MQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El hotel Marbella Club. [{"Name":"Alba Garrido Talavera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0ww_CpPczT_iViIH8cLuXjv9YKI2LRTg0-a21o8WlHH2tdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Tanto lujo y tanta clase en la web, pero la atención que he recibido deja mucho que desear. Soy propietaria de varias villas de lujo en la zona de Marbella y contacté con esta agencia por recomendación de Solvilla para gestionar el alquiler turístico de mis propiedades.

Mi experiencia fue pésima. La persona que me atendió al teléfono, la Sra. Aja, fue muy desagradable, con un tono inapropiado y nada profesional. Simplemente pregunté por la gestión que ofrecen y sus comisiones, y me respondió de forma cortante, diciéndome que enviara un email. No esperaba ese tipo de trato en una agencia que presume de exclusividad y excelencia.

Por suerte, ya he contactado con otra empresa en Marbella que ha respondido con toda la amabilidad y claridad desde el primer momento. Lamentablemente, no puedo recomendar esta agencia, ni volveré a considerar sus servicios. Una verdadera decepción.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alicia Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7VGC-BElzFtuGBIb4d2bmlDhMjHa2xmPRMnzY7FOhj0qf7-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"¡Esta lujosa casa en Marbella es simplemente espectacular! Los interiores son tan elegantes que te hacen querer quedarte para siempre, y las habitaciones son como nubes de comodidad. Pero lo mejor de todo es el área exterior y su piscina interior, es tan increíble que no querrás salir de ella, y los jardines son como algo sacado de una revista de diseño. ¡Es el lugar perfecto para unos días de desconexión! Y su ubicación está super bien, muy cerca de los mejores restaurantes de Marbella.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marbella Cocktail Studio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6_tMruGAFIvm0XCTXhN3jmcHCG6YrF5N1Zv2eZL7qgummGMw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Gracias Aitor y Cristina!

Muy agradecido con la magnífica comunicación en todo momento.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Esteban Clavijo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKbWQEo-PEh6UuExbYSqEZHYcta1MAnxME5u8T7i1w54ShuNg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rentamos un apartamento con Swish y tuvimos una excelente experiencia. Lo más Confiable de Marbella","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Manuel Arroyo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIiR0msOGkTzUZkkS7ibTEoPHH7BKF_7lhjCz8mxKinWUwuYw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Muy buen piso cuidado y limpio céntrico de todos restaurante y chiringuito","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Claudia Mead","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCEbNeS3dXI1HMs9KGD3P6DBXp_1YQm0CXcA6NR-ojT0gnxuK_=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dear Karen and team, I just wanted to say a HUGE thank you for all your help in making our trip to Marbella incredible. Unfortunately we were scammed by a villa advertised on Booking dot com and were left without anywhere to stay for the first two days of our trip. This is when we contacted Swish and by some miracle they had a beautiful villa available due to a cancellation! Villa Auriga was absolutely stunning, my family and I all had the best time and found it so luxurious and relaxing. It was well equipped, clean and to a very high spec. The outdoor area and pool was simply amazing. Swish’s attentiveness, efficiency and attention to detail is admirable and we’re very happy to have found such a professional and reliable rental company in Marbella. Dasha in particular was always on hand to help us out whether that be booking restaurants or picking up any bits we needed. Thank you for your kindness and for saving what could have been a really terrible situation! We will definitely be repeat customers- see you next year! Claudia and family xxx","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC76c7xLg&fid=0x0:0x4a0f64cf53f97f61"],"When":"2024-8-16"},{"Name":"Anders Aarskog Nesse","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJooxmTuS6bS0yHT8M0uP_s3nETKTx1-r9SoaNKEOH1iXdVWg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had the pleasure of renting a luxury apartment through Swish Marbella in the beautiful Puerto Banus area. From start to finish, the experience was exceptional. The Swish Marbella team, especially Karen and Jason, was incredibly helpful and responsive, ensuring that every detail of our stay was perfect. The apartment itself was stunning, with top-of-the-line amenities and breathtaking views. The location was unbeatable, just steps away from the vibrant Puerto Banus marina and all of its restaurants, shops, and nightlife. I can't recommend Swish Marbella enough for anyone looking for a luxurious and unforgettable stay in Marbella. Thank you for an incredible experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDX3dn6YQ&fid=0x0:0x4a0f64cf53f97f61"],"When":"2024-10-30"}]

[{"Name":"ANGEL LUIS RAMOS GONZALEZ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKnBCpFwF2W3ZObR1M2G4cNZOLUGPredsjWRKiB2RykuiRd=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Todo perfecto. Muy recomendable","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDXTkyLCecxtrvCKAbX23vR&fid=0x0:0x8d8e702de5c708a2"],"When":"2025-9-12"},{"Name":"Santa Survila","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXongc5UyKFM5KM_yA7TRouMZ5bRjbkkEmu_FI06UWm7E8zjLkHiA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"¡Un lugar estupendo para relajarse! El personal es muy atento y se ocupa de todo al instante. Un apartamento cómodo y espacioso junto al mar. ¡Gracias!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOBYMq82ShcMyAQ7jqyxg8&fid=0x0:0x8d8e702de5c708a2"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"rafael de benito","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4w8znn4Mw3KBMsBHthtHX-FQVqRQzxwEkVwV-mlElwukbk_g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Una experiencia perfecta. Completamente recomendable.
Ya habíamos estado anteriormente y hemos decidido repetir.
Contiguo a la playa, con restaurantes al lado y también tranquilidad para quien lo desee. Los apartamentos perfectos.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maria Botella","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKXbz1JwTkwZHac0OdDGz5C2p8PdVxsK34qb0OXS8ZvBYUc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Apartamento funcional en primera línea de playa con todos los básicos incluidos. La cama un poco incómoda y antigua, ya que hacía mucho ruido. Sin duda la limpieza podría mejorar ya que a la entrada al piso se hace únicamente una limpieza de cara y el piso no se encuentra limpio ni en condiciones.
La piscina muy cómoda y completa. Sin embargo este año había un olor muy intenso a cañería a partir de las 7 de la tarde que era muy molesto.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Javier del Pino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjRs0ubZyiTfdZ05H37zfZUGihMjqIbYGMlXfcxN-1eKh3ChTT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Los apartamentos Banana Beach están a 2,5 km del centro de Marbella y a 1 minuto a pie de la playa del Cable y tienen terraza con vistas al mar y acceso compartido a una piscina exterior que no usamos ya que preferimos la playa.
Disponen de varios tipos de apartamentos desde 1 habitación hasta el de 4 habitaciones con aire acondicionado y salón comedor con sofá y TV de pantalla plana en el salón. La cocina está equipada con horno, lavavajillas y microondas y menaje y hay 2 baños con bañera.
Ofrecen bajo petición y pago plaza de garaje en el parking subterráneo del edificio.
La conexión Wifi va bien y rápida para uso compartido familiar.
Lo mejor del ático las vistas de la inmensa terraza con barbacoa y jacuzzi aunque este no lo pudimos utilizar.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC6_62OuAE&fid=0x0:0x8d8e702de5c708a2"],"When":"2021-9-17"},{"Name":"Nuttylicious","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhuTEz5DUkcqtEZ2IaR4aEfLDazM5NSsvPYsTJno2okykJS5N9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Otro año más disfrutando de las vacaciones en los alojamientos “Banana Beach” de Marbella. Como siempre, disfrutando y desconectando del estrés y cansancio acumulado de todo el año. Como siempre, encantada de poder seguir viniendo a disfrutar y a descansar.

Gracias a Tatiana por su amabilidad y predisposición, da gusto poder seguir contando con este alojamiento para que las vacaciones sigan siendo inolvidables.

¡Deseando que sea ya Agosto del año que viene!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alejandro Navarro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIijZmn3PAY_vNZauwHqvIiPDY5Id9ZUaH2a-hc52O7jxY5lg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La mejor inmobiliaria para alquilar o comprar y vender.

Our experience with the company was great - specifically Nadine, Iago, and Sophie. Very responsive service and great communications from beginning to end. I hope to use them again in the future and recommend them to others.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shalinder Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKSw8LJKYu9IWHE4cYxDuD4yTt_N8fodF89Pzur5CQM8eUixw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst Vacation Ever – AVOID FLOX 1/2 JAPANESE GARDENS PUENTE ROMANO

PureLiving Is a Joke

Rented “Flox 1/2 Japanese Gardens” through PureLiving - a total disaster. No running water for 4 days (with kids!), and they never told us about the issue until after we checked in. No showers, toilets, or laundry.

The condo smelled like mildew, door locks were broken, and once water was back, the washing machine still didn’t work.

PureLiving’s “solution”? They offered to do one load of laundry. Manager ghosted us after promising a callback, and CEO was apparently too busy playing golf to speak with paying guests.

Embarrassingly bad service. Avoid PureLiving like the plague.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shelly Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKcluWPFBdx5Tp_BdF0I_HRDIw5EcFRT0or3oJcqcGCKqk7Mw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Absolutely Horrendous Experience.
AVOID PURE LIVING
AVOID FLOX 1/2 - JAPANESE GARDEN

Our recent stay at Flox 1/2 (PUENTE ROMANO/Japanese Gardens/booked through PureLiving Rentals in Marbella) was a complete disaster, a far cry from the “luxury” experience they advertise.

We had NO running water ALL 4 days we stayed at this piece of trash condo) which means NO flushing toilets, NO showers, and NO way to wash clothes — all while traveling with three children (ages 13, 9, and 5). We were forced to take our kids to cafés just to use a restroom.

From the moment we checked in, the apartment had an overwhelming foul smell, which only worsened over the course of our stay. I raised this immediately and was never addressed.

To make things even more absurd, they had workers and heavy machinery operating outside my room at 7:00am every day. Also, the key we were given didn’t even open the outside door properly.

And then comes the “professional” response from PureLiving — an insulting offer to cover one load of laundry. That’s their idea of compensation for days of unsanitary living conditions? The lack of basic utilities, foul odor, and locked door were all just brushed aside.

And yes, PureLiving took a percentage of the booking fee, so they profited off this nightmare. They now refuse to return even that portion, despite acknowledging in earlier communication that compensation was warranted.

We signed a rental agreement in good faith — and they delivered third-world conditions. I would never have agreed to this booking had I known what we’d face.

To top it off, I’ve asked repeatedly for a call with management and even the CEO. No one has stepped up. No resolution. No ownership.

If you’re considering booking with PureLiving Rentals, don’t.

AVOID FLOX 1/2 - wouldn’t wish this upon someone I hate.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Situado a dos pasos de la playa y de la zona de turisteo, restauración y zona de ambiente nocturna del puerto deportivo.  Y a 10 mtos de la zona vieja a la que se llega tras un cómodo paseo. Estuvimos en un piso alto(9º) con vistas a la piscina, en el 708 y las vistas impresionantes. Sin ruidos nocturnos y totalmente equipado para estar como en tu propia casa. Hasta cubitera enfriadora para el vino tenía. El cuarto de baño está arriba, pero hay un cuarto con lavabo y ducha abajo para la vuelta de la playa. Hay q madrugar para reservar y pagar las tumbonas, pero todo se hace con un ambiente social muy respetuoso y agradable. De 10!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"FouadB355","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QcoKrjftg2H5FSPDgamEji1HcAj6KJIMYEaB28IfM5URISpFokTGJ4TKCMmdB7Et-p_0g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Pasamos 11 noches en un apartamento catastrófico.|Hay un gran problema de alcantarillado: la bañera y la ducha huelen realmente mal.|Además, un vecino del C146 fuma marihuana todo el día. Hay que mantener todas las puertas cerradas, de lo contrario el olor de la droga se sentirá dentro del apartamento.|Añadiré que no hay aire acondicionado en el dormitorio.|Un consejo: ¡huyan de este apartamento!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nuria Ortiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDDWmFxVtE8eVSHYQB1JUtp4LvyzsOZKxcjk1NMN_YTAAUw6mh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El apartamento dispone de una buena terraza y estupendas vistas al mar. Además está adecuadamente equipado para una estancia agradable, sin demasiados muebles, ni adornos. Me gusta el edificio por las piscinas y la seguridad 24 horas. Además cuenta con salida directa al paseo marítimo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nuria Ortiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMF4v-1ivQ28jJcBa2kyputlwvlZnxLo6GxZZVjj79lCyZQhMGPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Las vistas del apartamento son espectaculares, y es uno de sus encantos, pero las cortinas están muy sucias. Además la parte de arriba de las cortinas no funciona con lo que no se pueden abrir. Desde la zona de la cama no es posible ver el mar, que es uno de los encantos del apartamento. El sillón individual estaba también sucio y medio roto. Las cuatro sillas de la terraza y el sofá sí son cómodos. El edificio cuenta con seguridad y el acceso a la playa es directo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pablo Alcocer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocILq2bEry5U5kq7AIBrAMuXYG6pwbx4HOokjiRFIR_ROGrzryo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"No me gusta dejar malos comentarios y nunca he tenido experiencias así pero espero que esto pueda ayudar a mejorar y ser lo que antes esta empresa era y ofrecía.
Llevo años alquilando con ellos pero esto ya es el colmo.

La habitación no había sido repasada antes de la llegada. Además del intenso calor dentro, no había sido ni ventilada.
Había mucho polvo en el suelo y escaleras.

El sofá también estaba sucio y tenía marcas de suelas de zapato por varias zonas.

Además la cortina de la ducha estaba en un estado lamentable y muy sucia. Básicamente no es lo que esperas cuando te vas de vacaciones y vienes cargado con maletas solamente pensando en descansar y disfrutar.

Si bien es cierto que tras la queja, nos dejaron unas sábanas para cubrir el sofá… si eso se llama solución.

La lavadora no funcionaba y estuvimos varios días sin poder utilizarla hasta que la repararon.

La solución a todo esto fue la devolución del dinero de una noche solamente cuando estuvimos 17 noches en pleno agosto. Imaginaros el precio total.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Iñaki de Prado Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI1fKQzOYOZr30M3VdY2Bi-kfhI4XbSQtqt1NLlqj4ANMeaKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Llevamos yendo a los apartamentos Skol varios años. Bonitas vistas al mar. Piscinas buenas y salida directa a la playa. Apartamentos limpios. Tienen de todo para pasar largas estancias. Seguridad en el edifico. 100% recomendable.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Shannon Stone","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWfuqIbF4fOKFA7gG9C4XaEi-7byRuv90a4yn5dPcpPX9MXQQT7=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Was an absolutely great place to stay. The views were amazing, beds were comfortable etc. Some things I would’ve changed however is all 10 guests that stayed only managed to have 1/2 hot showers as the hot water tan out extremely quick. There was a dishwasher but we had to purchase our own tablets, washing up liquid and cleaning sprays which should come with the Villa as we can’t take it home with us. There was someone always on WhatsApp to contact if I needed immediate help. A great stay but a hot shower each day would’ve been ideal. Also, don’t leave any mess even though there’s a fee for cleaning because it will be mentioned.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICxk__jLQ&fid=0x0:0x4d83fb2c7c674eb3"],"When":"2023-5-25"},{"Name":"David Firmin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL-9yAZ_sTFyl_uyGWCZDG7r6sgz6dAT7My_dbIVx9A3YvN7A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been to Marbella a few times already, but this villa really topped them all. We were a group of seven and had an amazing stay — not just in the house, but also in the beautiful neighborhood around it.

The villa itself is modern, beautifully designed, and super well equipped with everything you need for a perfect holiday. Everything felt thoughtfully chosen and high quality.

The location couldn’t be better. You can easily walk to supermarkets, great beach clubs, and some really nice restaurants.

But the absolute highlight for me was the 360-degree rooftop terrace. Watching the sun set over the mountains, the sea, the Rock of Gibraltar, and even the faint outlines of Africa — it was just unforgettable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Saskia Moonen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzUm89yJrVqRreI71S8_lJrxcNq_IEmfoDNQY3osoAmmnIrw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Het is ‘n super mooi vakantiehuis waar we met onze jong volwassene kinderen onze vakantie hebben doorgebracht. Precies zoals ook op de foto’s.
Het bevat tevens een vaatwasser, wasmachine en droger. Ook waren handdoeken en zwembadhanddoeken aanwezig. Er waren wel maar 4 ligbedjes aanwezig, 2 meer was al makkelijker geweest. De slaapkamer naast de voordeur werkte de airco niet goed, in de rest van het huis wel. Een informatiemap was wel handig geweest. Bv waar je de afvalzakken naartoe kon brengen, was even zoeken. De toegang tot de tuin en het huis was goed geregeld via een link en app om te kunnen openen en sluiten. Ligging was perfect! We zouden er graag nog een keer terug naartoe gaan.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jimmy C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7F8BGmNaukxads0oZs6zSDpZQmv5bQFNeN9UO0CxZKjGkMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mimi Meyer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIPEUs5bD2aFCaU4X-8CFROGxhaPPTRb98s-V2sE_wTUzBpyg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Monica Gentile","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIoj3JgI45K3TsB6lMpXj5qJKF9U-EIMnmTnqw0gf2aYsH2Iw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Jacques Schueremans","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfXBVgHXEEbRjsa1-386ri3_jJ3W8wYXMUvidKrzq7dg0XYZYC=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I know Laurent from Marbella Properties since 2016, when he helped me finding the apartment I was looking for. In two days, it was all wrapped up, and he organized everything with a lawyer, a banker, and a notary office. 9 years later, he was as efficient in helping me to sell the apartment, and organized in no time the "legal" parts of the transaction. I fully recommend him as very reliable and focused.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Melanie Sheehy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXigBf2Z60ykfyG51gmedEr2lBQZaXBAmb7KjgiZKsaaoCiM19_=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I heartily recommend the services of Laurent and Louise at Marbella Properties.

I found them to be engaging, professional and a thorough pleasure.
My wife and I gave Laurent and Louise our brief in relation to price, preferred locations and they did the rest!

Whilst conversing with them, they talked about options, their suggestions and why and explained what the process was going to be… essentially they held our hand all the way.

On our trip to Spain they collected us at the airport and gave us a guided tour of the proposed properties over a two day period, with the occasional stop for a beautiful lunch! We viewed 14 properties in total and most of those were within our budget(!) which was refreshing, and one slightly over showing us what we’d get if we spent a touch more.
Of the 14 properties we viewed we would have happily lived in 8 of them!  We singled out the one we wanted and left the rest to them!  They advised us the figure that they believed would secure the property and they were correct.

The process of buying the property was incredibly smooth.
The lawyer they recommended was thorough, professional and operated in a timely manner.

The exchanging of funds, the process of actually legally buying the property and collecting the keys was largely done by Laurent and Louise!
They kept us informed and as they’d set expectations beforehand there were no surprises for us along the way.

Our hacienda in Marbella provides us with much joy.

Hand on heart, the process wasn’t stressful and Laurent and Louise were excellent in every facet!

They are beyond superlatives and know their business!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4nK76Kg&fid=0x0:0xb3159edc8989d457"],"When":"2018-2-20"},{"Name":"Anne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKBfiaD3AY_T0zFWITALQxW9ZXuIfZ1ZyVQZ2KRefYsGYsvQt4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Expérience tout à fait positive, Laurent Coulée est professionnel, trilingue parfait, réactif et à l’écoute.
Il connaît très bien le marché, est très disponible et ne calcule pas ses efforts.
Je recommande sans réserve.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mike Davies","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcGFtd507wxwbzKkqa2udWoUaU961y4JfZHfBCBWMmXlWg5TwM0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Louise and Laurent acted for us in the sale of a prestigious apartment in Puerto Banus. They advised some upgrade ahead of sale which they project managed. They then marketed and sold the property in a short period, realising virtually the full asking price. We were UK based throughout but had full trust in the process. Recommended without reservation. Bonus is that they are really nice people.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Caroline Brown","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4YQO_ZT1cry4KoQsYwu_ObozMsYJVqDPIWnREYNlSZz5aJC8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just have to compliment Marbella Properties on their great service and succesful selling of our villa!! Nothing was ever too much trouble and they were always available for help and guidance through the whole procedure. Many thanks again for your expert advice.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicholas Metcalfe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJcvTERXC-GhiktpcgN3msXTQqtYi3oi3hwYppwExwFzPOYzg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Laurent and Louise did a fantastic job from start to finish and we sold our villa within 6 months even during Covid which was remarkable!
Nothing was too much trouble and they did a great job with marketing and handling to the new purchasers. We would recommend Marbella Properties to anybody thinking of buying or selling in the Puerto Banus/Marbella area. Thanks too both. Nick and Libby Metcalfe.:-)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Angela Lopez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUtFPmYJ7tLOjuJsUh6gVEdqBk6XHX0xFDvu6JylXpyH4dLgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Since August 2021 Louise had patiently been advising and showing me numerous apartments in La Quinta, my area of choice, following a recommendation by my cousin who lives in the area.
I finally found my ‘perfect place and quiet sanctuary’ in December and the whole process couldn’t have gone any smoother due to Marbella Properties’ dedication, professionalism and hard work. I can highly recommend Louise and Laurent and their other contractors they work with.
Now to deal with all the issues/challenges that Brexit has left and obtaining residency!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Philippe van den Berch","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIulWEQxbfjNvYB_O1Ro5jMX2FmFObJDeL-kK8R3xSX0WmHow=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Le service obtenu dans la recherche de notre appartement a été parfait.
Cela a commencé par une discussion sur nos souhaits, ensuite, des biens nous ont été montrés. On a affiné nos choix, et durant plusieurs jours, un grand nombre de biens nous ont été montrés par Laurent.
Et ceci jusqu’à ce que nous trouvions exactement ce que nous cherchions.
Nous avons obtenu aide et soutiens, rendant cette acquisition d’une simplicité étonnante finalement.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Jaime Prieto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJa-0tVYmdhscTEW0emWF67mnEgpgmI7D6Mqs9-zeazSu23Rw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tuvimos la suerte de contar con el asesoramiento de Libehomes para la compra de una finca en la provincia de Cádiz, y no podríamos estar más satisfechos.

Manolo y Diego son, sin duda, de los mejores profesionales con los que hemos trabajado. Su conocimiento del mercado inmobiliario español es profundo y preciso, y su trato al cliente es excepcional: cercanos, atentos, pacientes y siempre dispuestos a ayudar.

Además de su profesionalidad, destacan por su calidad humana. Al ser locales y hablar varios idiomas, facilitan enormemente todo el proceso, especialmente para quienes venimos de fuera.

From the moment I reached out, their team was professional, attentive, and incredibly knowledgeable about the local market. They took the time to truly understand my needs and preferences, guiding me every step of the way in finding the perfect property.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Khalid Mensour","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDnQvuFJeNXjlQFux1NNLBuAwP65OSZKV34Lgw8HNFZJN8XScgFg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Unfortunately, we cannot share a positive experience with Key Real Estate. Alarmingly, our experience was very similar to the review by Mat Madaness on Google – and in our case, even worse.

We rented a house in El Paraiso (Marbella) through Key Real Estate for Christmas and New Year’s. Our contact person was Anna. Upon arriving at the property, we noticed that the heating throughout the house was turned up to the maximum, making it unbearably hot. Exhausted from our trip, we went to bed and left the balcony door slightly open to let in some fresh air.

At around 4:00 a.m., we woke up to a horrifying scene: a burglar, masked and carrying a flashlight, was in our bedroom. He stole my watch right in front of us. This traumatic event has left a deep scar on our family, and our son has been in therapy ever since.

The following morning, I confronted Anna about the break-in and wanted to contact the police. Shockingly, she advised against it, saying it would not help. After reading Mat’s review, her response now makes more sense to us.

Additionally, the garage door was broken, so we had to park our car on the street for the first four days. On the second day, sunglasses were stolen from our car. Despite informing Key Real Estate, we received no compensation for this incident either.

To process the shock of these events, we returned to Germany for a week and spent Christmas at home.

Afterward, we were unjustly charged €1,500 from our deposit with the baseless claim that we had used the pool heating – which we absolutely did not. The explanation given was that they needed to “wait to see the electricity bill.”

We have since hired a lawyer to take legal action against this unfair treatment.

We strongly warn against using this agency and hope no other families have to go through such an ordeal. If you have had similar experiences with Key Real Estate, please contact us so we can take action together.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elena Sidorova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7_bodoo4AQWJ03lbFl-0WMltrWUPR47AMVld5AjxGMJ9Mjuo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Мы провели на вилле 2 недели в начале октября. Вся наша большая семья чувствовала себя очень комфортно. Дети не выходили из чистого и ухоженного бассейна, который мы решили подогревать для максимального детского комфорта несмотря на теплую погоду.
Территория виллы ухоженная и удобно обустроена. Кухня хорошо оборудована. Спасибо Key Real Estate  за безотказную помощь по первому нашему запросу. Чистые полотенца, постельное белье, одеяла, подушки - все было.
Вилла очень удобно расположена. Продуктовые магазины, аптека, спортивные клубы - все в досягаемости на машине 5 - 10 минут. Раке жилой и спокойный. 15 минут до Марбейи и приблизительно столько же до Эстепоны. Мы получили массу удовольствия и чудесно отдохнули. Большое спасибо!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mat Madanes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJdsCpH9lMTO_S1o9njw26Lj9G-hUSkhdCmhtXSz1QkS-mnzA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Hello, I don’t recommend working with this agency. Anna talik who rent me a house that was stolen yesterday night. While we were sleeping. They took everything. She and the maid she recommended had the house keys. She doesn’t want to be helpful in any way with the National Spanish police. Neceser go through this realty agency.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Väl på plats i oktober-21 visade Carina mig runt på ett femtontal utvalda objekt under 2 veckor, vissa objekt besöktes 2 gånger.

Efter lite funderingar hit o dit tog jag mitt beslut och så var köpprocessen igång med förhandling, kontrakt och den administrativa delen. Hhomes med Carina har lotsat mig genom hela processen på ett korrekt och säkert sätt med advokater och myndigheter. Vidare har Carina hjälpt mig med olika ärenden som egentligen ingen mäklare är skyldig att göra.

Nu sitter jag i min nya bostad i centrala Marbella och skriver dessa rader.

Jag kan verkligen rekommendera Hhomes och Carina Ulander för ett bostadsköp på Solkusten, hela processen har gått lugnt och säkert tillväga.

Johan Åkesson","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"John Norling","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIu2O5Xk3L8Cyin1_75vozsMW1P2pDLJ3hZ9Cz7vqIySeZpgA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good service and good market knowledge.

Lo único que conocen es decir que algo es „exclusivo y muy demandado“ para justificar precios altos a pesar de que el servicio es lamentable. Por cierto, terrenos que luego no se venden ni en un año. Cero confianza. Asturias tiene potencial, pero así no.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"M L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqQz0nhja3O9BsrgJEKNMcqomIeL1jVkvtARvwghyboZ0RoA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"DECEPCIONANTE GESTIÓN, ROMPEDORES DE SUEÑOS. SIN RESPETO A LA NEGOCIACIÓN QUE ESTABA ABIERTA Y POR CONFIRMAR EL PRECIO QUE PEDÍA LA PROPIETARIA. (Tengo las conversaciones que lo corroboran)
El 17 de febrero contacte con Rebeca. Vivimos a 1000km, de donde íbamos a comprar una propiedad. Era una casa vieja y teníamos el presupuesto ajustado, aún así hicimos varios viajes en avión hasta Asturias, para ver la propiedad, volvimos para que nos asesorara un especialista. Queríamos que viera las vigas de la casa, ya que había una con problemas. De los varios viajes, nunca conocí a Rebeca, la agente encargada de la propiedad,  ya que coincidió, que estaba de viaje, y nos atendió una compañera, pero  siempre hablábamos con ella  por whatsapp. El domingo 15 de marzo hicimos una oferta por la casa para empezar a negociar el precio. Redactamos los pros y los contras con mucho cariño y ofrecimos 75000€. La espera se hizo eterna.
El martes 17 de marzo a  primera hora de la mañana nos dijo Rebeca que la propietaria quería 82500€ . Mi marido me llamó para confirmar el si, pues ya estaba considerada esa posibilidad de subir hasta ese precio y enseguida tratamos de contactar con Rebeca para decirle que accedíamos y comprábamos.
Quedamos con Rebeca que le devolvíamos la llamada para confirmar. En menos de cinco minutos teníamos la respuesta. En más de cinco ocasiones tratamos de hablar con ella , a pesar de estar trabajando, sonó el móvil de mi marido dos tonos, que no le dio tiempo a contestar y ya que era Rebeca le devolvió la llamada al minuto siguiente, ella contestó por whastsapp “que estaba ocupada en el juzgado”por whatsapp, pero no contestaba las llamadas.
Teníamos la ilusión y emoción de decir si aceptamos el precio propuesto y comprar. Era un proyecto familiar lleno de significados. Rebeca no contestó. Sobre las 15:00 hora, por fin, nos llama para decirnos que se la ha vendido a otra persona y que esa persona en ese transcurso de tiempo ya dio la señal de arras 🥲🙈
Así que nada, nos dejaron sin opciones.
Si te vas a comprar una casa con esta persona, no dudes, no compruebes, no hagas ofertas y no te ilusiones.
Entre tantas buenas opiniones, yo he tenido que llenarme de fuerzas para contar mi experiencia. Seguro que a alguien le sirve y a alguien,  le avergüenza.
Aún sigo esperando por la promesa que nos hizo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alfredo Fernández Sánchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKJ4AvUvO36mK7t2KG2ffCPbAlU9cfYw64nxTiFh_NMf7HfsA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"¡¡¡Muy recomendable!!!
Es un placer encontrarse con gente tan amable y profesional como Aida, se adaptó a nuestros horarios para realizar las visitas y es una persona encantadora.Gracias!!!!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Se me olvidaba, ha sido muy fácil hacer la reserva y en todo momento he recibido mucha información para poder tomar decisiones. En mi caso, por la simpatía y cortesía de la persona que me hizo la reserva. No solo le interesaba que realizará la reserva, si no que quedará satisfecho con la casa que eligiera. Hemos conocido a la inmobiliaria a través de unos amigos que llevaban años viajando con Spain Realty y la verdad estamos muy contentos. Año que viene probaremos reservar algo parecido por la zona de Alicante, a ver que tal, de todos modos, lo suyo es empezar mirar las cosas con 5 – 6 meses de antelación, es cuando hay más ofertas y los precios son más terrestres. Mi cuñada antes lo buscaba en las páginas de Google, y cada año nos las jugábamos haciendo reservas con cada agencia distinta. Ahora sabemos que ésta agencia presta servicios en todas las provincias de Andalucía, Alicante, Tarragona, Costa Brava, y creo que gestionan algo también en las Canarias. [{"Name":"Hamza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEoRTkajQtN1WoOIqtu3bV-eo7DBO8fw4rlCOijOcqZcgA762WIw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Experiencia muy negativa. Tras reservar la vivienda, realizar los pagos correspondientes y esperar 3 años, nos obligaron a realizar la visita de cortesía el mismo día de la firma. Ante las deficiencias detectadas y nuestras quejas, la única solución ofrecida por la promotora fue resolver el contrato, en lugar de corregir los problemas, con el evidente objetivo de volver a vender la vivienda a un precio más alto y obtener mayor beneficio.

La vivienda fue entregada con graves deficiencias: aire acondicionado averiado, falta de agua caliente y humedades, sin desagües en las terrazas, carpintería fatal, …..

El asunto está denunciado. Recomendamos extremar la precaución y valorar otras promotoras más serias.

SON UNOS ESTAFADORES !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carlos Moreno Fernández","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJd6TBHEQgDADHY5TMD0xTn4fobLnjRNncd7v8k-HkuEbPrWA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Compré una vivienda en Laguna reseidence, demoraron 9 meses la entrega, la entregaron al límite de la prórroga legal, si el retraso hubiera sido para entregarla perfectamente o con detalles sin importancia sería lógico, pero de 58 viviendas no se salva ninguna, humedades, goteras, ninguna pared bien hecha, todas las puertas se frenan con el suelo, todos los marcos de puertas des cuadrados, y las puertas y cierres con golpes y marcas,ningún enchufe ni interruptor alineado, cocina totalmente descuadrada, baldosas partidas, cierres que no cierran, rodapiés mal sellados, zonas comunes como si llevaran 10 años abandonadas, balcones sin desagües, la empresa solo responde cuando están al límite de plazos legales, dieron de alta contadores de luz y te pasan un contacto suyo para cambiarlo a tu nombre cosa que no debería ser así, en una empresa muy poco profesional en todos los aspectos.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hannah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUm8q1licZp39n01Y4cI5VnHMfhrxv4s3zZ5yvHMw-gwHzoW13D=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"EVITAR ESta PROMOTORA A TODA COSTA!

Experiencia lamentable con esta promotora.
El edificio es nuevo y presenta grietas visibles, filtraciones de agua, el sistema de aire acondicionado no funciona y, para colmo, no hay ascensor operativo. Se han comunicado todos estos problemas en múltiples ocasiones y la promotora no contesta ni da ninguna solución.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Francisco Ramirez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJT5uLRF3AWYlbu1dO2fZHZssfNVsdINgRMPrHUcOITIA3EpA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Hemos comprado una casa en Oasis Añoreta y después de 6 meses aún no han arreglado los desperfectos.
No responden al teléfono y se han desentendido totalmente.
Bajo ningún concepto recomendamos comprar una casa con ellos. Básicamente nos han estafado a toda la comunidad y han hecho una chapuza con la piscina comunitaria (rota) y las zonas comunes que ahora se niegan a arreglar.
Como se puede ver las fotos nos han dejado una raja abierta entre ambas casas sin solucionar. Un muro trasero sin construir que venía en los planos de la casa y la verja que han puesto en su lugar en el primer vendaval se ha venido abajo (ver fotos).
La puerta del garaje rota (han venido a verla 4 veces y no han hecho nada) y muchas ventanas mal selladas, especialmente la del cuarto del bebé.

Re-edición: NO COMPRÉIS NADA CON ELLOS va para 2 años que no arreglan los desperfectos. Son un absoluto desastre además de unos ladrones.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICWyfK3JQ&fid=0x0:0x7b797318cc2ed6a0"],"When":"2022-3-1"},{"Name":"BELINDA AVILA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLInqgH35L1UiCMbiHv5HB65p-gGog9m7iBLJ5tnnCdwggeiQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Hemos comprado una chalet adosado en Oasis Añoreta y nos han estafado individual y a nivel de comunidad. No han construido el muro trastero de las casas que estaban en el proyecto, dejando la parte de atrás desprotegida con una reja que se ha venido abajo y que no arreglan.
A nivel comunidad han hecho una chapuza de piscina que está rota y tenemos que arreglar la comunidad.
Vamos a entrar a denunciarles a nivel de comunidad porque no se hacen cargo de la chapuza de obra que han hecho y de todos los desperfectos.
Si estás pensando en comprar una casa con ellos no lo recomendamos en absoluto.
El nivel supera la ESTAFA!! Tened mucho cuidado con esta empresa y con la constructora Baremprix","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lorena muñoz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLbOuqAs2iOthxFnETwCUI7olcpVofX-skEReNMwANF8AiI0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Compramos una casa en oasis añoreta, muchísimos desperfectos los cuales se niegan a arreglar, poca palabra por parte de la promotora, no cogen el teléfono y se despreocupan por completo.
Muros traseros inexistentes, muros rajados, cristales rotos, piscina comunitaria rota. No los recomiendo en absoluto.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jose Antonio Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJMt-fWlyqrzPNcNhuqlK5X9OVqLqIvQrTQP2WUA0zAMYYQJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Compre una de sus casas "de lujo" hace seis meses y, además de tener desperfectos como zonas de la tarima flotante sin relleno donde pisas y te hundes o una escalera de marmol con la mayoría de los escalones manchados con algo que no se quita y en algunos casos con desperfectos por los golpes, hace 2 semanas una "verja de seguridad" fue arrancada de cuajo por el viento, y que nos dijeron que la culpa la tenía el cañizo que habíamos puesto... grandes profesionales y gran calidad de construcción como podéis ver... Además, muros rajados que llevan "arreglando" meses... en fin, como podéis ver una constructora de confianza (conjuntamente con Baremprix). Antes de comprar pasaros por Oasis Añoreta para que algún vecino os lo enseñe y así podéis valorar vosotros mismos.
MxM dice ser sólo la empresa comercializadora... cuando vende un producto tienes que asegurarte de la calidad del mismo, no sólo llevarte el incentivo de venta y desentenderte, no es serio.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDW8OreuQE&fid=0x0:0x7b797318cc2ed6a0"],"When":"2022-3-13"},{"Name":"I. P.M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXhrulNbQ5F-IWJGs5R-WN-Ae75qkg7wYv8yRD_gY0T2dN3WygG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"He intentado ponerme en contacto hasta en 6 ocasiones para ver una vivienda en venta en Granada y no obtengo respuesta alguna","Images":null,"When":""}]

Cerrado para visitantes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICl2o679gE&fid=0x0:0xc52aa882dd81a307"],"When":"2023-11-16"},{"Name":"Alberto Pérez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKW8L30aOGsPgHFmNgXs3lqnlfFC4MCljM16PpY2rL34cE0Xw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Es una comunidad de apartamentos y dúplex,cerrada y con seguridad privada,más pijos por metro cuadrado que en la calle serrano de madrid","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MARIA DEL CARMEN JIMENEZ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcUd8zPAHJX2BD6NPYzD792YfwxjxgjWz6KnAos-NY2_OPNX6Z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Gran comunidad, lugar exquisito a pie de playa. Las.instalaciones magníficas,. Con seguridad y personal de mantenimiento muy agradables. Ya son muchos vecinos los que disfrutan las maravillosas terrazas todo el año sin polvo sin viento y sin lluvia, abriendolas en su totalidad cuando hace buen tiempo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICjw7XcEQ&fid=0x0:0xc52aa882dd81a307"],"When":"2024-4-25"},{"Name":"Isra.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7e08DfFrOp3JWMtJz2S_zkC8HHSPt2fYVD0wX-gaRXrOkOpZZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ¡Un paraíso en el paseo marítimo!

"El “Maria y Mariola” es como descubrir un tesoro en pleno paseo marítimo de Marbella. Desde que llegamos, sentimos que habíamos entrado en un mundo aparte, donde el lujo y la comodidad se dan la mano.

Empecemos por las piscinas: ¡son tan increíbles que casi esperábamos ver a sirenas saliendo a saludar! A ras del suelo, perfectas para un chapuzón mientras disfrutas de las vistas. Y el jardín central... ¡no es un jardín, es un paraíso botánico donde hasta las plantas parecen estar de vacaciones! 🌴🌸

El garage privado es otro nivel; las plazas son tan grandes que casi podrías montar un picnic al lado de tu coche. Además, la atención es simplemente impecable, te hacen sentir como un VIP desde el primer momento. Por si fuera poco, el equipo de seguridad está tan preparado que te sientes como si estuvieras en una fortaleza de lujo (¡pero sin perder el ambiente relajado, claro!).

En resumen, el Maria Mariola es el lugar perfecto si buscas una escapada donde el lujo, la seguridad, y la comodidad se encuentran en cada rincón. Sin duda, un lugar para repetir una y otra vez. ¡Totalmente recomendado! 🏝️✨"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ana M. Del Castillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVC_tiUi9j10KHsavrT9QQtUSEkLB99mkupyfoHz8gFb3jJJqjx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un Hotel con una vista impresionar impresionantes, no lo conocía me gusta mucho tanto las vistas como la atención del personal","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leonardo Daniel Arias lede","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhi02UO4b1ThnBq3iYCQ5diA4GJ0sskuNO64MiPtg-UEANibn1DA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Muy bien 👍","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrea S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUImM-BUq9DxBY_r8aXHy9TeH5DPZ-Ut4nnsG6Sr4pvRrETgzC52A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bonito lugar","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anne French","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKp-UuuWq2f2xf2OVhIMeT8tsh8GpsoUaVyeXKvaxh1dIuiDA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I saw a rental apartment advertised by Marina Mariola..I called and they promised to sent the information by email..made promises to view..I am an exceptional client and have a budget of 7000 euros per month..but the rental staff here are so so rude!!! Nuestro equipo de técnicos altamente capacitados está disponible para atender cualquier problema que pueda surgir con su sistema de climatización.

Realizamos reparaciones rápidas y eficientes para restaurar el funcionamiento óptimo de su aire acondicionado. Ya sea que se trate de problemas con el compresor, la unidad exterior, los ventiladores o cualquier otro componente, estamos equipados para solucionarlo de manera profesional y rápida.

Además, ofrecemos servicios de mantenimiento preventivo para garantizar que su aire acondicionado funcione de manera confiable y eficiente durante todo el año. Nuestros programas de mantenimiento incluyen limpieza de filtros, revisión de componentes, lubricación de partes móviles y ajustes necesarios para maximizar la eficiencia energética y prolongar la vida útil de su equipo.

Nos enorgullece ofrecer un servicio personalizado y atención al cliente excepcional. Entendemos la importancia de contar con un ambiente confortable en su hogar o negocio, especialmente en las cálidas temporadas de Marbella y Benahavís.

Confíe en Solclimar para todas sus necesidades de reparación y mantenimiento de aires acondicionados en Marbella y Benahavís. Estamos comprometidos a brindarle soluciones confiables y de calidad para mantener su comodidad en todo momento.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ana M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcAI7MvRbmFrd-sLxQCztocLEaIIVFci_ANnniCAz-XfWTN7UJGw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Espléndido!!! [{"Name":"Chris Needham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZ58E34mkHN3hYKpN0rmy8Xj3nEtL5yyd8XMtqtzdqWrDTDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As good as it gets!

Firstly Diane helped us find properties that matched our requirements and negotiated extremely well on our behalf for the villa we chose.  It was great to have someone so knowledgeable working on our side. We found a property we liked, but it needed some more work and that's where Steve came in, project managing a multitude of trades and tasks.

Steve's an excellent communicator, a person who delivers solutions not problems and one of the most trustworthy people I have met.  Getting it right for you, the client, is a priority for this company, and a refreshing change.  I can't recommend them highly enough.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juanita Watts","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLgDAfvCJU1Lb3NuAiY2uMscfdIGC4VFc16tUj6f_yTcknrxw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best Agent in Costa Del Sol!

We decided to purchase a property in Marbella and approached a few different agents in the Marbella area with our requirements. Unfortunately, they did not listen or try to understand what we were looking for - instead they bombarded us with numerous properties that failed to meet our criteria. In a nutshell many of the other agents appeared to be looking for was a quick sale and the commission!!

Steve was recommended to us by a good friend who had lived in Marbella for over 15 years. He informed us out of the 100’s of agents in and around the area, Steve at I FIND MARBELLA was the only agent he could vouch on.

We contacted Steve the next day and he invited us round for a chat to discuss our requirements and see how he could help. The first thing that struck me was Steve’s open and honest approach, he listened to what we were looking for and then explained how the whole process would work.

We then discussed different areas and Steve identified to us a few areas that we had not even thought of which he said would have some fantastic opportunities for renovation and growth. Unlike other agents, Steve was genuinely interested in helping us find something that ticked all the boxes – he wasn’t just seeing it as an opportunity to earn some commission.

Steve also informed us he could put us in direct contact with reliable trustworthy Lawyers, Accountants, Architects, Banks, Tradesmen etc so he could provide us with the full package we were looking for. It’s so daunting when you live in another Country, there are so many untrustworthy people and companies around that it can be a minefield finding the ones you can trust, rely on and provide the service that you require.

We felt at ease with Steve and had the confidence after our lengthy discussion that he would find us our dream villa…………..

And that he did!!!!!!!!!!

After viewing around 10 different properties (some we went back twice to for additional visits) we eventually settled on not 1 but 2 ! Steve collected us each time and took us for the viewings, at no point in time did he pressurise us or try to sway our decisions. He was patient and an extremely good sounding board. I would speak to Steve a few times each day to discuss viewings and iron out all the pro’s and con’s. He was extremely valuable to us and made our purchasing decisions so much easier, we were thankful to have been introduced to him.

Whilst the 1st villa would be our family villa the 2nd would be an investment. Both requiring renovation work to meet our criteria and hopefully over the next few years both giving us some healthy growth in our invested capital.

Steve negotiated the prices for us and started the whole legal purchase. He introduced us to Juan – Steve’s recommended lawyer who did a fantastic job for us. He was so thorough and didn’t leave any stone unturned. Juan then recommended us a Tax Accountant and even came to the meetings with us to see that the process was kept as smooth as possible.

We cannot express how grateful we are for Steve’s open, honest approach. He has made the whole process so simple and pain free.
Steve also introduced us to a Bank Manager who set new Spanish accounts up and gave us quotes for all our insurance requirements. They too were extremely helpful and everything was carried out with 100% ease and efficiency.

I am so happy to have met Steve and he will definitely be finding our next property for us! What we find with Steve is that he is so passionate and dedicated with what he does, he goes that extra mile and is at the top of the league with customer service and client satisfaction.

Steve is in it for the long term not just a quick fix like many of the other agents we have come across clearly are!

I too, like my friend who recommended us to Steve, would personally vouch for Steve and I FIND MARBELLA and I have to say in my 25 years of running my own company I cannot say that about many people.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julie Mccarlie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJDN3FIggyZskU9f9wg0JkOleWqz5Ftke0X0muhRs0pA6ebiA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best estate agent ever!
After deciding we wanted a holiday home we luckily fell upon Steve. The original home we wanted sold before we got to view it, but Steve soon found us another home which was even better. We hadn’t done much research into the buying process, but Steve gave us all the information we needed and supported us not only throughout the purchase but afterwards as well. Steve met us at our new property with the keys, and helped bring all the furniture in. I really could not recommend Steve enough, not only is he fantastic at his job, he’s a lovely person who we would now regard as a friend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Toni Kelly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIISQHITkcHPcmN0-1Zlc2jKOsxY4IM9F5KQkq2qdw2ChtJow=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband first contacted Steve at ifindmarbella in April 2021. At this point we hadn’t yet visited Marbella so were completely clueless as to what was on offer but knew that’s where we wanted to be. Right from that first conversation Steve was informative, professional and seemed to very quickly work out what type of property and location would work best for our family. We were sent over numerous properties to have a look at and had regular contact with Steve who kept us up to date with what was going on with the property market etc. Once we were able to we flew to Marbella in August to meet with Steve. He collected myself, my husband and our two children from our hotel and gave us the tour of beautiful Marbella before showing us around several properties he had narrowed down as what he thought would work for us. So hassle free! Steve was just as great in person and it was very easy for our family to spend time with him. Our children loved him and he was so patient with them despite them being tired and cranky! Viewing properties is the part of the process we would normally dread with the hard sell etc but we didn’t get any of that with Steve. He was an absolute breath of fresh air and let us view our potential new homes without even the slightest hint of being pushy or rushing us. Infact on several occasions he pointed out things that we should be aware of and had a completely unbiased attitude to everything. I really do believe Steve would of stopped us making any bad decisions and wanted us to end up with a home we were truly delighted with. And we have. After falling in love with a property that in our dream location Steve began the negotiations and got us an absolutely fantastic deal on our new home. This didn’t come easily either but Steve was determined to get us what we wanted and fought our corner every step of the way. We were kept up to date with everything and despite pestering him daily through sheer excitement he would always happily answer our questions. The whole process was smooth and stress free for us, I’m sure Steve would of been shielding us from alot of the hiccups along the way! The purchase of the property was completed in December and we are truly over the moon with it. Our faith and trust in Steve is second to none and this is why we have chosen him to project manage the reform of our new home.

To sum it up, if you’re looking for an agent you don’t want the hard sell or ego from who is just so easy to work with (even gives you a few giggles along the way) then we can’t recommend Steve enough. Thank you IfindMarbella!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Louisa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHXnJKxd866TqcEaf1vulwJZXidL1b92nyfSKVDgHatg27ohvT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had never heard of a buying agent before so didn't understand what a boon having one would be.

Steve took the time to find out exactly what I wanted in a property and location, then took care of all of the viewing arrangements. He saved me all of the hassle of finding the right sort of properties and more importantly the headache of juggling appointments with loads of agents.

Steve held my hand throughout the buying process from introducing me to an excellent Spanish solicitor to getting the keys to my dream home.

I highly recommend Steve to anyone looking for their ideal home in the sun.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Roy Stanley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-XiFEhIZPk3ywyevW9VsjfiFVzBrduzmbzKRpFpNT-lX9=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Steve was fantastic throughout the process of selling our house in Spain. From pre listing recommendations, through a cosmetic facelift, to listing and finally the sale itself. He made the whole process painless. His whole approach was professional, courteous and most importantly friendly. Nothing was too much trouble for him. Thank you Roy and Loretta.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carlo Piran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8bxhYn1fGQda4zipR8h6TxMEY1Isv-CX3uIcp5L44cfKcL6qWQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Outstanding Service During the Buying Period and Beyond.

We looked at many individual properties over the years near Marbella. However, when we really entered the buying market we made the typical UK newbie mistake by booking individual agents to look at individual properties. Big Mistake!

If you don’t know, the way it works in Spain is the estate agents all have access to all the same listings. So, if you do like we did, you pretty much end up with them all wanting to show you a list of properties which will inevitably mean one agent gets the keys to a property you have booked to see with another agent.

So what do you want as a property buyer?

You want someone that is trustworthy, listens to what you are looking for, understands your red lines and then actually spends some time using their knowledge of the area to help you build a good list. Many agents say this, but then send you a list they spent 5 minutes on with properties that completely ignore your criteria.

You may also think you have a perfect list. But what you don’t know is that Property X is outside your price range and not on your list but Steve happens to know the seller will settle in your price range.

This is where a good agent really adds value and that is why we highly recommend Steve as that is what he found for us. In fact, on our 2nd meeting with Steve we were lucky enough to have 2 properties that we were happy with. One we then went on to purchase.

In addition to all this, what make Steve unique to us and sets him apart from all the others is that even months after we bought the property and he got his commission he still helps us by recommending good window companies, building suppliers, where the closest skip is, people who come and take away items you don’t want for free etc.

If you are looking to buy a property, we can’t recommend Steve enough – book him for a couple of viewings and see for yourself.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Phil Redfearn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIw6X3nM9FCeCJ5b_GBnyvvKWwraRiDMEGEu410Q56NJWlVPA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After a previous bad experience with a property agent in Spain, Steve was a breath of fresh air and very good.
He isn't pushy and very knowledgeable of the industry and the area.
Also very importantly is the after care. Steve has been so helpful after the purchase and continues to be.
A good guy and a new friend for me.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Julian Gregorio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKOuWf_TKGy-qKKvcBpsO7RCa5jiWLjNVqwltuDqWF1hqFweQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Agradecer a Mónica por la gestión y espera a la hora de devolver el piso que alquilaba. Valoro su comprensión por la mudanza que he tenido que hacer y su espera en la entrega de llaves. Por la gestión, agradecido de facilitar la devolución de la fianza. Gracias","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lorena D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKxe68Dno_JGdJ7ANHp6WQNVXH9d5AUzYrVSSiNqskiHwXVwg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Hace tres años me fui de alquiler a un piso en Costa Nagüeles, alquilado por Mónica personalmente, ya que conocía a mi familia desde hacía tiempo.
Escribo esta reseña después de mucho tiempo porque me ha costado asimilar la mala experiencia que me hicieron pasar.

En una época en la que yo no hacía más que trabajar y dormir, algunos vecinos me hicieron pasar un auténtico infierno porque, según ellos, mis perros —un cachorro y un yorkshire— les molestaban. Me perseguían, iban a mi puerta a grabar y se quejaban de mí y de mis perros incluso en días en los que ni siquiera estábamos allí. Una vecina llegó a decirme que iba a envenenar a mis perros.

Además, se inventaban que yo hacía fiestas por la noche, algo totalmente falso, ya que mi rutina era simplemente trabajar y descansar.

Lo peor es que las quejas coincidían con días en los que no estábamos allí, ni yo ni los perros. Se lo decían a Mónica y, en vez de ayudarme, ella me acosaba con las mismas quejas. Lejos de apoyarme, me presionaba continuamente. También involucraron al conserje, quien no dudaba en abordarme cada vez que me veía, diciéndome cosas que no eran verdad.

Me sentí acosada y perseguida. Era una chica joven viviendo sola, y fui el blanco más fácil.

Además, cuando por fin me fui porque encontré otro lugar, no cambiaron el nombre del contrato de la luz y tuve que estar pagando la electricidad del nuevo inquilino que metieron, lo que me generó una deuda con la compañía eléctrica que no se solucionó hasta dos años después, tras múltiples correos míos y de mi madre.

Sinceramente, fue una experiencia muy desagradable. Si podéis, evitad esta empresa.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Iñaky Arao Kaplan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKCe1ONiX446cH8QDAZdGhgM7f7gW3jZOT6OsgqKMtBhYNmA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excelente atención,  muy atenta a todo y muy buen trato , le dejo 5 estrellas porque no se pueden poner mas!!! He got a detailed list of what I was looking for and sent me a number of properties, both off-plan and already built. We then spent a couple of calls talking through the wish-list.
We spent a full day looking in the area at various properties and developments. Stephen helpfully talked about the different areas and their pros and cons, and it was great to get his years of knowledge downloaded to me in the car.
At no point was he pushy and he was a helpful sounding board. When it came to the process of buying he introduced me to a great solicitor and made sure that I was protected at every point.
I'm now looking forward to my house being completed in Estepona, and Stephen will most definitely be invited around for an Estrella or two!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Seth DeLong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9CWmRmYVd5HV9V_vo5caPDD_ghGf7mq_2-AfmpFgbKhOI3NxKOA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I arrived in Spain, on the Costa Del Sol, to look for property. Stephen Lahiri showed me many properties along the coast. He was patient with my inquiries and always full of knowledge about the areas we visited. He was able to show me the Costa Del Sol in ways I would not have known about, from just looking at the property listings online.

And then he introduced me to my Dream House, and helped me get it for a good price. I am fully satisfied, and very content. I could not recommend a better agent.

Seth R. DeLong, Ph.D., J.D.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Nash","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJx0BtRKU9pk454QtX-AjKu6jz1COcA9ltupmiRCpQaDhL30w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have used Lucas Fox for purchase and rental services.
At all times they have been efficient and contactable when ever we have needed them. The benefit of a multilingual service has been vital and I cannot recommend them highly enough for any property requirements.
Keep up the good work Lucas Fox team ... gracias..","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Claes Dahlén","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIygjAWoXcCwVVblV27xFsjJizpZn78uOXmN2WHJucje4izhg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We rented an apartment in Costa del Sol during the time we were looking for an apartment to buy. We contacted several real estate agents and looked at numerous apartments in different areas of Costa del Sol. When we got in touch with Stephen Lahiri at Lucas Fox he stood out among the agents, as very knowledgeable and helpful.
He quickly understood what we were looking for and showed us relevant apartments in different areas. Stephen also took us around in the different neighbourhoods and showed and told us about its facilities, such as stores, restaurants etc. It was very helpful to get his extensive knowledge about properties and different communities based on his experience after living in the area for so long. He was not a pushy sales person and we felt we could comfortably discuss the pros and cons with the properties as well as the areas with him. Together with Stephen, we looked at quite a few apartments and he was always very patient, easy-going and also prepared to show us new ones without delay.
When we found the apartment we really liked he helped us all the way through the buying process and was very protective about our rights and concerned for a proper and correct process, including referring us to a first-rate lawyer.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Simon Armstrong-James","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUc9B0_kxu-uomnykQcM09S3dMMl8qj1jNnnCFP2bi0Un0TvZI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Arjen, has been superb in helping me looking for properties i Marbella area.

Desde el primer contacto, el equipo de Business Bay Marbella  demostró una profesionalidad y amabilidad excepcionales. Me ayudaron a encontrar un piso para los tres meses de verano  que superó todas mis expectativas: limpio, bien ubicado, perfectamente equipado y con todos los detalles cuidados.

title: Fuerte de Nagüeles
address: C. Lago de los Cisnes, 29602 Marbella, Málaga, España
descriptions: Albergue sin pretensiones con habitaciones sencillas, piscina exterior y pistas deportivas.
about: null
user_reviews: [{"Name":"882anabelenr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeWB0GIG9gGd6g9zDFXwjE9TRuKRtAO6HvwA5jEdK_CrOJXcVxp8esjQRYTFMjay2JK=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Horrible! Mi hija fue de viaje de fin de curso en 2025 y tuvimos que recogerla antes. Iban a ser 4 días pero desde el principio no le gustó nada. Solo podían entrar a la cabaña a partir de las doce de la noche después de la disco aunque no quisieran ir pq estaban cansados. Mi hija dice que se sentía como si no tuvieran casa y estuvieran tirados en la calle. Les quitan el móvil al segundo día y no le dejan hacer ni una foto de la cabaña ni de nada, imagino que por el estado en el que está todo. Las literas de arriba sin barandilla. Un sólo baño para 10 niñas con un sanitario con la tapa que se mueve y una ducha que no traga agua, con una cortina de plástico llena de moho en el que se escapa el agua y llega a los pies de las camas y de las maletas que solo pueden poner en el suelo pq no hay otro sitio donde ponerlas. Paredes con humedades. Las habitaciones solo las limpian dos veces en toda la estancia, el día que llegan y el día que se van, con lo que eso conlleva, sanitario sucio, ducha llena de pelos, barro en el suelo... Fuera de las cabañas había tres duchas y tres sanitarios más para 3 colegios (unos 300 niños). Añado algunas fotos que mi hija hizo a escondidas y por eso no se ve bien lo que describo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pablo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKpkJf7jn4cKqFhMIG8PQuv4XTvC40JT7G6YKSzpDeMl5oG01L=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Colchones duros como piedras, almohadas desgastadas. Duchas que hay que mantener apretado un botón para que salga el agua y el agua de la alcachofa sale de 3 boquetes y cada uno en una dirección. Los turnos de comida se los saltan, teníamos que desayunar a las 8 y hasta las 8:35 no aparecieron a repartir la comida. Muchos platos y vasos sucios y la higiene para repartir muy mejorable. Reparten la comida a los que tienen dietas especiales (lactosa, celiacos, etc.) con los mismos utensilios que a los demás. Menús con mucho frito y poca fruta y verdura. Toda la comida muy procesada y de bote.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jose Manuel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURksFxf2-5S08Uh_zIqrRlRgAP2w0pQ7WdwiuuOxUjgXN6-dk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Para viaje de fin de curso estuvo muy bien me lo pasé genial lo único que por la noche cada vez que hablábamos se metía una guardia a decir que nos calláramos y los monitores en general eran muy pesados pero cuenta con actividades muy divertidas como tiro con arco,piscina,montar a kayak,Tirolinas y muchas más  y las habitacion me acuerdo que éramos 11 chavales en una habitación con literas, un poco pequeña pero para dormir esta muy bien","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"francisco navarro gil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIcc2yg_FKUwCG0mx0nMT3qDOE4pB13m_U2uTg3a4JXguxm-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"No te dejan ni visitar las instalaciones.
